commit.message:
Drop unused `sub[IL]_reg_min()` instruct blocks

The `subI_reg_min()` and `subL_reg_min()` blocks from the previous patch
will never be used by C2 since `sub reg, MIN` nodes are rewritten as
`add reg, MIN` in `Sub[IL]Node::Ideal()` during GVN.  Assuming every
`SubI` and `SubL` node goes through GVN, including those created in
subsequent compilation phases, we anticipate that nodes like `sub reg,
MIN` will never occur in the backend.
